expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: The rightmost category tab is cut off, with the label only showing as "Hot Gam" instead of the full title.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention text spelling errors; all reported issues describe layout and clipping problems with UI elements.
